title: Cheese-Factory PR Plan
description: Phase 7 PR-layout document written by /cheese-factory at .cheese/cheese-factory/<slug>/pr-plan.yaml. Consumed by scripts/pr_plan_to_branches.py to emit branch / cherry-pick / PR-create commands.

shape.description: Layout shape chosen by the PR planner based on the dependency structure.

body.description: 1-3 sentence PR body describing what the group ships.

base.description: Branch this PR targets. `main` for the root of a stack or any orthogonal-flat PR; otherwise the previous stack member's branch.

commits.description: Ordered list of commit SHAs from the manifest (7-40 hex chars; matches git's default short-SHA floor and rejects option-shaped strings like `--abort`).

depends_on.description: Branches that must be merged before this PR.

pr_number.description: Filled in by Phase 7 after `gh pr create`.

pr_url.description: Filled in by Phase 7 after `gh pr create`.
